assignments.name: topicBank
assignments.value:
education | Share a practical tip that helps the audience save time | Teach something useful
behind_the_scenes | Show what happens before a post goes live | Humanize the process
trust | Explain why consistency matters more than chasing virality | Build credibility
faq | Answer a question people ask often | Remove friction and confusion
proof | Share a small, believable win or result | Keep it grounded
product | Highlight one feature or service benefit | Make the value concrete
community | Offer something helpful with no hard sell | Build goodwill
promo | Make a soft offer that feels natural | Encourage action without pressure

assignments.name: complianceRules
assignments.value: Avoid false claims, guarantees, deceptive urgency, hate, harassment, confidential data, or policy-violating content. Keep it factual, platform-native, and helpful.

options.systemMessage: You are a senior social media strategist and copywriter. Produce premium, platform-native copy that is accurate, calm, helpful, and safe. Return only valid JSON and do not use markdown fences.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;

const auditSummary = {
  workflowMode: 'daily',
  runId: input.generatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
  approvalDecision: input.approvalDecision,
  approved: Boolean(input.approved),
  brandName: input.brandName,
  selectedPillar: input.selectedPillar,
  selectedTopic: input.selectedTopic,
  selectedAngle: input.selectedAngle,
  trustScore: input.trustScore,
  complianceStatus: input.complianceStatus,
  tiktokReady: Boolean(input.tiktokReady),
  recommendedVideoIdea: input.recommended_video_idea || null,
  videoIdeaCandidates: Array.isArray(input.videoIdeaCandidates) ? input.videoIdeaCandidates : [],
  approvedAt: input.approvalReceivedAt || null
};

return [{ json: { ...input, auditSummary, auditLine: JSON.stringify(auditSummary, null, 2) } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, publishPlatform: 'X', publishSucceeded: !input.error, publishErrorText: input.error?.message || input.error || '' } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, publishPlatform: 'LinkedIn', publishSucceeded: !input.error, publishErrorText: input.error?.message || input.error || '' } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, publishPlatform: 'Facebook', publishSucceeded: !input.error, publishErrorText: input.error?.message || input.error || '' } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, publishPlatform: 'Instagram', publishSucceeded: !input.error, publishErrorText: input.error?.message || input.error || '' } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, publishPlatform: 'TikTok', publishSucceeded: !input.error, publishErrorText: input.error?.message || input.error || '' } }];
return [{ json: { skipped: true, reason: 'TikTok credentials or video URL are missing, so the TikTok branch stayed draft-only.', ...$input.first().json } }];
